ideas.intro: Ideas for projects, activities, books, games, and more for students with a high level of interest.

items.content: [ ] [Watch a meal being cooked](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Ppmlp3VQx3E) in the same way it would have been made in the 1800s.
[ ] (Ancient) Explore this [timeline](https://lifeofcaesar.com/timeline-of-the-life-of-gaius-julius-caesar/) of Julius Caesar's life.
[ ] (Ancient) Watch [National Geographic: In the Shadow of Vesuvius](https://youtu.be/NI6C2DueJGo?si=MHqMoZElnCQ_wZ-8). \*Preview for art images
[ ] [Visit a Civil War site](https://www.nps.gov/civilwar/places.htm) in one of our National Parks.
[ ] (Ancient) Search for women from your readings at the [Visual Museum of Women in Christianity](https://www.visualmuseum.gallery/gallery/).
[ ] Do some research about the Central Pacific Railroad. [This website](https://www.up.com/about-us/history), commemorating the 150th Anniversary of the completion of the Railroad could help.
